# Standard Markdown Fixture

This fixture exercises every CommonMark construct.

## Inline

**Bold** *italic* ***bold italic*** ~~strike~~ `code`
[link](https://example.com "Title") ![img](pic.png)
<https://auto-link.com> <email@example.com>
Hard break  
next line.

## Lists

- Unordered
  - Nested
- Another

1. Ordered
2. Items

- [x] Task done
- [ ] Task todo

## Blockquote

> Nested
> > Double nested

## Code

```javascript
const x = 42;
```

## Table

| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |

## Horizontal Rule

---

## Footnote

Text[^1].

[^1]: The footnote.
